info.title: Run a Call External API
info.description:
Bearer-authenticated REST API for pushing data into and pulling data out of Run a Call.

All endpoints are scoped to the organization that owns the bearer token. Tenant isolation is enforced server-side; cross-org reads return 404 (not 403) to mask existence.

Rate limits: 60 req/min sustained per key (override-able by founders), 120/10s burst, 300/min per org, 5 concurrent in-flight per key. Exceeding any layer returns 429 with a `Retry-After` header.

Every request carries an `X-Request-Id` header. Quote it when reaching out for support.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer records — full CRUD in Phase 2.

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: Service locations belonging to a customer.

tags.name: Equipment
tags.description: HVAC equipment installed at a property.

tags.name: Voice Calls
tags.description: AI receptionist calls — unique-to-us asset with transcripts.

tags.name: Communications
tags.description: Outbound + inbound SMS/email log per customer.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
Outbound HTTP webhook deliveries from Run a Call to subscriber URLs.

**Authentication.** Every POST carries `Run-A-Call-Signature: t=<unix>,v1=<hex>`.
The signed string is `${ts}.${raw_body}`. Verify with HMAC-SHA256 against the
subscription secret. Reject if `Math.abs(now - t) > 5 minutes` to defeat
replay attacks.

**Deduplication.** Each delivery's `event.id` (header
`Run-A-Call-Event-Id`, also in the JSON body) is stable across retries
of the same logical event. Store the last N event ids you've processed
and dedupe before applying business logic.

**Retry policy.** Subscriber returns 2xx within 10 seconds → success.
Anything else (non-2xx, timeout, network error) is retried up to 3 total
attempts with default Inngest backoff. After 10 consecutive terminal
failures, the subscription is auto-paused and the org owner is emailed.
Resume from /settings/integrations/webhooks/{id}.

**Concurrency.** Run a Call caps fan-out at 100 matching subscriptions
per single internal event and concurrent deliveries at 50 in-flight per
function — beyond that, the system bails rather than fan out unbounded.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token issued from /settings/integrations/api. Format: `rkc_live_<32 base62 chars>`. Hashed at rest; the raw token is shown to the org owner exactly once at creation.

id.description: Stable event id (e.g. evt_a93a7817f5a8485d80204becea). Dedupe across retries by this value.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor. Pass back as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.

external_id.description: Integrator's own identifier. When paired with `external_source`, POSTing the same value twice upserts the existing row (200) instead of creating a duplicate (201).

external_source.description: Namespace for `external_id` (e.g. 'servicetitan'). Required when `external_id` is provided.

CustomerPatchRequest.description: Partial update. `external_id` / `external_source` cannot be changed via PATCH (re-POST with a new pair instead). Unknown keys return 422.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor. Pass back as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.
Opaque cursor. Pass back as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.
Opaque cursor. Pass back as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.

JobWriteRequest.description: Required FKs (customer, property) can be supplied as UUID OR as `{name}_external_id` + `{name}_external_source`. Equipment is optional, same dual form. PATCH on jobs is status-only.

JobPatchRequest.description: Status-only per spec §4. Invalid transitions (per VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS — same rules the UI enforces) return 422. No-op (same status) returns 200 with the unchanged row.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor. Pass back as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.

service_agreement_id.description: Service agreement UUID. The service_agreements table does NOT carry external_id columns in V1 — UUID is the only supported reference.

400.description: Invalid request — query parameter validation failed.

404.description: Resource not found (or exists in another org — existence is masked).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the seconds in `Retry-After`.

post.description: POSTing the same `external_id` + `external_source` twice upserts the existing row instead of creating a duplicate.

200.description: OK — an existing row was updated. Returned when the supplied `external_id` + `external_source` matched an existing row (idempotent retry).

201.description: Created — a new row was inserted.

400.description: Invalid request — query parameter validation failed.

404.description: Resource not found (or exists in another org — existence is masked).

409.description: Concurrent INSERT race lost — another request with the same `external_id` + `external_source` won. Retry the same payload; the upsert will hit the existing row and return 200.

422.description: Request body validation failed (Zod). Common causes: missing required field, unknown field (.strict()), `external_id` without `external_source`, FK reference not found in this organization, invalid job status transition.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the seconds in `Retry-After`.

post.description: A new customer was created (UI, REST API, or imported). Fires once per customer row.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A user-initiated change to a customer's contact info, billing address, or tags. Background sync writes (QBO sync, voice-driven last-contact) do not fire this event.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A job's status transitioned to `scheduled`. Always fires alongside `job.status_changed`.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A job's status changed. Fires on every real transition. Lifecycle-specific events (`job.scheduled`, `job.completed`) fire alongside this one when the new status matches.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A job's status transitioned to `completed`. Always fires alongside `job.status_changed`.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: An estimate was sent to the customer. Fires on every send including re-sends (correcting a typo, follow-up nudge). Each send is a customer-touching action.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A customer approved an estimate, either via the public approval token or in-person on a tech's device. The emitted row's `converted_job_id` is populated when the auto-conversion path runs.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: An invoice transitioned from `draft` to `sent` (first issuance). Re-sends of an already-sent invoice do NOT fire this event — it's a state-transition signal, not a touchpoint signal.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: A payment closed the invoice — sum of recorded payments ≥ invoice total. Fires immediately after `payment.received` for the closing payment.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: Any payment recorded against an invoice (cash, check, ACH, credit card, Stripe Connect). Fires before `invoice.paid` when the same payment closes the invoice.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: An AI receptionist call finished post-call analysis. Fires for spam-classified calls too (subscribers may want them for fraud / observability).

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: The AI receptionist or a Retell mid-call tool created a follow-up task. Single canonical INSERT seam — auto-resolver only updates status, never re-fires this event.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.

202.description: Subscriber accepted delivery for async processing.

default.description: Anything other than 2xx triggers a retry (up to 3 attempts). After 10 consecutive terminal failures the subscription auto-pauses.

post.description: Reserved. Not currently emitted — the Stripe Connect `invoice.paid` → `customer_memberships` correlation requires a Connect-routed handler that ships in a future phase. Subscribers should poll `GET /api/v1/memberships?status=active` until then.

requestBody.description: Webhook event envelope POST'd to the subscriber URL.
